text_jp: どうした、仮面ライダー{END}
text_en: Kamen Rider... you are here too!{END}

text_jp:
俺が、このサボテン爆弾で
あの世へ送ってやろう{END}
text_en: This must be their bomb plan.{END}
This place will be your grave!{END}

text_jp: 本郷！…まだガスの影響が{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: おのれ！仮面ライダー２号！{END}
text_en: Kamen Rider... you are here too!{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: ライダーダブルキーック！！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
